_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: HK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: HK Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after HK Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Selective disclosure is permitted only under the incomplete negotiations safe harbour
shall not trade or recommend trading in the Controller’s securities
limited to what is necessary and proportionate for the above
will not export identity documents unless strictly necessary
onward transfer to sub-processors (including offshore affiliates)
proposed acquisition of Coral Ridge Foods Limited
Processing purposes include merger and acquisition diligence, fund investor onboarding (AML/KYC), and employment/secondment workflows, limited to what is necessary and proportionate for the above.

Prior to any onward transfer to sub-processors (including offshore affiliates), the Processor will confirm whether the relevant information has been “cleansed” by public announcement; for example, the Controller’s 3 May 2026 announcement on the Exchange’s news website (PHEX ref: P2026/1456) regarding the proposed acquisition of Coral Ridge Foods Limited is already public and should no longer be treated as MNPI.
